title: Democratic Resilience Panel: V-Dem + SWIID + OWID + ERT + SOCX (1960–2023)
summary: Country-year panel (11,733 observations, 190 countries, 1960–2023) merging V-Dem electoral democracy index (EDI) and liberal democracy index (LDI) sourced from OWID grapher CSV API, ERT gradual-erosion and coup-onset flags, SWIID v7.1 market/net Gini with standard errors (5,226 country-years, 192 countries, 1960–2017), OWID Luxembourg Income Study redistribution series, OECD SOCX gross social spending, Penn World Table rgdpe_pc GDP per capita, Lee-Lee/Barro-Lee schooling, and a derived democratic-stock variable (cumulative prior years with EDI ≥ 0.5). Dataset: democratic_resilience_panel.
